ddls:
CREATE TABLE "filters" (
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter */,
  "filter_type" TEXT /* Type of filter (e.g., Low-Pass, High-Pass) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the filter's purpose and application */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the filter belongs */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the filter was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the filter (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filter_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated filter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., Passband) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "typ" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., Continuous, Discrete) */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "nominal_value" REAL /* Nominal value of the parameter */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance value of the parameter */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the parameter */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filter_parameters_filter_id FOREIGN KEY ("filter_id") REFERENCES filters ("filter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filter being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the filter */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the filter was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the filter */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser and operating system) of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_filter_id FOREIGN KEY ("filter_id") REFERENCES filters ("filter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filter_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filter related to this version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the filter parameters */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the changes */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filter_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filter_versions_filter_id FOREIGN KEY ("filter_id") REFERENCES filters ("filter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filter_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related filter */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filter_notes_filter_id FOREIGN KEY ("filter_id") REFERENCES filters ("filter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filter_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filter_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Analog, Digital) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the category (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filter_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filter */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the filter belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filter_category_mapping_filter_id FOREIGN KEY ("filter_id") REFERENCES filters ("filter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filter_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES filter_categories ("category_id")
)
